FAQ’s

Online store, shipping & delivery

How much does shipping cost?

Shipping costs will vary depending on your location. On average, shipping to Melbourne Metro areas starts from $12.50 and national metro from $15.00. Remote rates are charged on top of national rate at surcharges starting from $10.00. Parcels will be charged based on weight at the discretion of our staff in accordance with delivery providers specifications.

My order arrived broken/damaged. what should I do?

Shipping costs will vary depending on your location. On average, shipping to Melbourne Metro areas starts from $12.50 and national metro from $15.00. Remote rates are charged on top of national rate at surcharges starting from $10.00. Parcels will be charged based on weight at the discretion of our staff in accordance with delivery providers specifications.

I need to cancel/return my order. what should I do?

Shipping costs will vary depending on your location. On average, shipping to Melbourne Metro areas starts from $12.50 and national metro from $15.00. Remote rates are charged on top of national rate at surcharges starting from $10.00. Parcels will be charged based on weight at the discretion of our staff in accordance with delivery providers specifications.

WARNING

Under the Liquor Control Reform Act 1998 it is an offense to supply alcohol to a person under the age of 18 years (Penalty exceeds $8,000). For a person under the age of 18 years to purchase or receive liquor (Penalty exceeds $700). Liquor License #33721176
